caption: The video appears to be an advertisement for a financial education service called "Fibonacci 24/7" by Larry Pesavento, as featured on TFNN.com. The ad emphasizes the educational aspect of the service, aimed at investors looking to enhance their trading skills using Fibonacci techniques. A key selling point highlighted is a satisfaction guarantee, promising a full refund within 30 days if the customer is not satisfied. The segment is part of "The Tiger Technicians Hour," hosted by Basil Chapman, and aired on June 8th, 2022. The visual design includes a green and white color scheme with a Fibonacci spiral graphic, reinforcing the theme of the service.
